title: 4 x Customised Wheelie Bin Number and Address Stickers Self Adhesive with Personalised House Number and Street or Road Name Waterproof and Weatherproof Custom Bin Sticker 10x15cm (Option 02)
features: Size: Each sticker measures 100mm x 150mm (6" x 4"), perfect for clear visibility on wheelie bins and other outdoor containers
Customisation: Personalised with your house number and street name in bold, clear text for easy identification
Durability: Waterproof and weatherproof construction ensures long-lasting performance in all weather conditions, maintaining clarity and adhesion
Pack Contents: Set of 4 identical self-adhesive stickers allowing for multiple bin labelling or replacement as needed
Easy Application: Peel-and-stick design allows for quick, straightforward application on clean, dry surfaces
description: Product Description Wheelie Bin Stickers Will stick to any clean dry smooth surface (like plastic, glass, tile) Will not rip or fade over time Resistant against the weather (rain, ice, snow, sunshine) Durable protection against scratching
